case_title: DAE YAN WOONG VS. KOREAN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN JOSE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOONG, DAE YAN AS TO DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN JOSE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY WOONG, DAE YAN AS TO DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(KYUNG S. YI)* SERVED JAN-22-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN JOSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOONG, DAE YAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KOREAN BAPTIST CHURCH OF SAN JOSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
